enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Anbulla Appa?

The song Anbulla Appa expresses deep love and gratitude towards a father, highlighting the unique bond shared between them.

What is the context of this song in the movie Sigaram Thodu?

In Sigaram Thodu, the song plays during a pivotal moment that emphasizes the protagonist's relationship with his father, showcasing emotional depth.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer K.J.Yesudas, known for his soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for Anbulla Appa?

The music for Anbulla Appa was composed by D.Imman, who is celebrated for his melodious tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 11, 2014, as part of the movie Sigaram Thodu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Anbulla Appa from Sigaram Thodu is a touching tribute to the unconditional love between a father and child. It conveys emotions of gratitude and affection, evoking a sense of warmth and nostalgia. The soothing melody, combined with K.J.Yesudas's heartfelt rendition, creates a serene atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song beautifully encapsulates the essence of familial bonds, making it a perfect choice for celebrations and moments of reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anbulla Appa is a heartwarming melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and devotion. Sung by the legendary K.J.Yesudas, this song from the movie Sigaram Thodu showcases the magical composition of D.Imman. Its soothing vibes make it a perfect tribute to the bond between a father and child, resonating deeply with listeners.
stanzaMeanings: Father, there is no one like you on this earth. Father, there is no one like you on this earth. Father, I have seen love in you and in my mother.
You give me everything I need in this world. You are the god who gives without expecting anything in return. You are the truth, Father, there is no one like you on this earth.
The mother who gave birth to me is also my life. Time will always protect me. Without you, I have no one. You will not let me fall. You have made me walk on the path of my destiny.
Father, there is no one like you on this earth. Father, I have seen love in you and in my mother.
You are my friend, and you will help me overcome challenges. You hide my sorrows and give me smiles. You will not let me sleep without seeing me. You will live for me, you are my shadow.
Father, there is no one like you on this earth. Father, I have seen love in you and in my mother.
You give me everything I need in this world. You are the god who gives without expecting anything in return. You are the truth, Father, there is no one like you on this earth.
